description: F7 retirement savings and AML stack. CONSAR CUF and LIC article 115 PLD DCG remain source-blocked pending official regulator PDF resolution.
notes: LSAR, LFPIORPI, and REG-LFPIORPI are imported from official Camara de Diputados sources.
LFPIORPI is also listed in CNBV Normatividad; Diputados is used here for law-library consistency.
Do not import CONSAR CUF or article 115 LIC PLD DCG from unofficial mirrors.
